title: [ESCALATION] Recover Founding Engineer agent and deploy VITA-323 fix
description:
## Objective

Investigate and recover the Founding Engineer (FE) agent, which is currently in `error` status, and deploy the critical platform fix for [VITA-323](/VITA/issues/VITA-323).

## Why This Matters

- **Platform Blockage**: FE error blocks all governed execution and platform-level fixes.
- **Regression**: [VITA-323](/VITA/issues/VITA-323) prevents autonomous issue creation and checkout for new tasks (execution-pin anomaly).
- **Merge Blockage**: [VITA-329](/VITA/issues/VITA-329) (promotion-branch merge) is stalled.
- **Resource Waste**: The system remains constrained despite improved agent utilization (5/7 agents active).

## Success Criteria

- FE agent status restored to `idle` or `running`.
- [VITA-323](/VITA/issues/VITA-323) fix is deployed and verified.
- Checkout conflicts on self-created issues ([VITA-457](/VITA/issues/VITA-457)) are resolved.

## Context

- See [agent-health-2026-04-16.md](/VITA/issues/VITA-446#document-agent-health-2026-04-16) for system audit details.
- Tracker: [VITA-400](/VITA/issues/VITA-400).
